Metric Tons key commodities

Agro Metal brings together international expertise, strong momentum, and strategic partnerships to lead the next wave of opportunity across the rapidly evolving agricultural commodities, metals, and mining sectors.
Headquartered in Dubai, connecting suppliers and clients worldwide.
Certified, experienced, trusted by leading global market participants.
Leading agriculture, metals, mining with sustainable global operations.

Connecting industries worldwide with essential resources through seamless, responsible, and innovative trade solutions.

sections.heading: Metric Tons
body: Connecting industries worldwide with essential resources through seamless, responsible, and innovative trade solutions.
These values define who we are at Agro Metal FZCO and are the cornerstone of our sustainable growth for our clients, partners, communities, and people.

Conducting business with honesty, transparency, and fairness. Upholding commitments and ethical sourcing. Reliability – Dependable & Consistent Ensuring secure supply chains and consistent service. Proactively managing risks and mitigating disruptions. Customer Focus – Your Success First Tailoring solutions to meet client needs. Building long-term partnerships based on trust and communication. Excellence – Constantly Improving Driving innovation and continuous improvement. Investing in people and celebrating achievement. Sustainability – People, Planet, Prosperity Minimizing environmental impact and ethical sourcing. Supporting communities and responsible resource management. Collaboration – One Team, Global Impact Fostering teamwork, diversity, and inclusion. Working closely with partners, suppliers, and clients to achieve shared goals. These values define who we are at Agro Metal FZCO and are the cornerstone of our sustainable growth – for our clients, partners, communities, and people.

sections.heading: Metric Tons
body: Conducting business with honesty, transparency, and fairness. Upholding commitments and ethical sourcing. Reliability – Dependable & Consistent Ensuring secure supply chains and consistent service. Proactively managing risks and mitigating disruptions. Customer Focus – Your Success First Tailoring solutions to meet client needs. Building long-term partnerships based on trust and communication. Excellence – Constantly Improving Driving innovation and continuous improvement. Investing in people and celebrating achievement. Sustainability – People, Planet, Prosperity Minimizing environmental impact and ethical sourcing. Supporting communities and responsible resource management. Collaboration – One Team, Global Impact Fostering teamwork, diversity, and inclusion. Working closely with partners, suppliers, and clients to achieve shared goals. These values define who we are at Agro Metal FZCO and are the cornerstone of our sustainable growth – for our clients, partners, communities, and people.

Agro Metal’s growth framework centers on vertical integration, regional expansion, product diversification, and digital modernization—each aligned to global supply and demand shifts in agricultural commodities, metals, and mining.
Strengthening operational control across sourcing, logistics, processing, and mining to improve efficiency and supply security.

sections.heading: Metric Tons
body: Strengthening operational control across sourcing, logistics, processing, and mining to improve efficiency and supply security.
These values define who we are at Agro Metal FZCO and are the cornerstone of our sustainable growth – for our clients, partners, communities, and people.

Extending our market reach across Africa, Asia, MENA, and Europe through strategic alliances and local market development. Deploying analytics, digital platforms, and risk management systems to enhance margins, optimize decisions, and support customized client solutions.

sections.heading: Metric Tons
body: Extending our market reach across Africa, Asia, MENA, and Europe through strategic alliances and local market development. Deploying analytics, digital platforms, and risk management systems to enhance margins, optimize decisions, and support customized client solutions.
Investing in sustainable mining, community initiatives, and environmental stewardship to support long-term enterprise value Vertical Integration
Scaling volumes and expanding into a broader commodity mix including grains, oilseeds, edible oils, copper, zinc, and industrial metals to serve global food and industrial demand
